title: McCarthy Tétrault Reinforces its National M&A and Capital Markets Strength with New Partner Claire Sung
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Reinforces its National M&A and Capital Markets Strength with New Partner Claire Sung
We are thrilled to welcome Claire Sung back to the firm as a Partner in our Business Law Group in Vancouver. As a McCarthy Tétrault alumni with a proven track record of building trust and delivering client-focused results, Claire brings valuable expertise in navigating complex, multi-jurisdictional transactions, and strategic issues.
Claire adds value through her robust skillset and depth of experience in M&A, corporate finance, securities and corporate governance, and seasoned business acumen honed through her time in-house integrated with business teams. Prior to rejoining the firm, Claire served as senior counsel at a global chemicals leader dual-listed on the TSX and Nasdaq where she was a trusted advisor to the executive team and senior management and led complex cross-functional, multi-stakeholder transactions and projects locally and across global markets. In addition, she was a member of the Corporate Crisis Management Team, managed the global legal policy compliance program and led legal support for key global operations in Asia Pacific, North America, the Caribbean, and the Middle East.
Claire’s multifaceted experiences in managing high-value global operations further enhance our ability to provide clients with practical, business-focused legal solutions tailored to their needs. Her unique in-house and international background, including her expertise in navigating the rapidly evolving local, regional and international market dynamics and regulatory landscape, equips her with an exceptional understanding of the day-to-day priorities of legal teams and business leaders.
“Claire has always demonstrated a deep passion for her work and dedication to securing the best outcomes for her clients,” said Eva Bellissimo , Partner and National Business Law Practice Group Leader. “Her deep knowledge of M&A, capital markets and corporate governance, paired with her pragmatic, results-driven approach, will be invaluable to clients navigating sophisticated transactions and regulatory challenges.”
“I’m thrilled to return to McCarthy Tétrault and be a part of a trusted team renowned for its capital markets and M&A expertise,” said Claire. “Having worked closely with the McCarthy team on the client-side, I know that clients and their success are truly at the forefront of what we do and how we work. I look forward to partnering with our clients and driving exceptional outcomes together.”
With expertise in the industries that matter most to the global business landscape, our M&A Group has the proven experience to get deals done. Clients benefit from our history of industry-focused advice and perspective. No matter the size or complexity, McCarthy Tétrault has a leading position advising on the transactions most important to your business, such as mergers, acquisitions, divestitures, joint ventures and partnerships in a wide range of industries. Our M&A Group specializes in advising clients on the largest and most innovative domestic and international deals. We have knowledge and expertise in every type of M&A transactions, and we have played a principal role acting for every type of transaction participant. Learn how our team can help you.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact:
- Claire Sung Partner People.Offices.Singular Vancouver
